content.text: Now let me read the key files you mentioned. I'll start with the ones you specifically named:

content.content:
1→#!/bin/bash
     2→# Ralph Loop - Main loop script with output formatting
     3→# Runs inside the Docker container
     4→
     5→set -euo pipefail
     6→
     7→# Track start time for session duration
     8→SESSION_START=$(date +%s)
     9→
    10→# Colors
    11→RED='\033[0;31m'
    12→GREEN='\033[0;32m'
    13→YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
    14→CYAN='\033[0;36m'
    15→NC='\033[0m'
    16→
    17→log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
    18→log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
    19→log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
    20→log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
    21→
    22→# Generate work summary
    23→generate_work_summary() {
    24→    local exit_reason="${1:-completed}"
    25→    local session_end=$(date +%s)
    26→    local duration=$((session_end - SESSION_START))
    27→    local duration_mins=$((duration / 60))
    28→    local duration_secs=$((duration % 60))
    29→
    30→    echo ""
    31→    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    32→    if [ "$exit_reason" = "interrupted" ]; then
    33→        echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Ralph Session Interrupted${NC}"
    34→    elif [ "$exit_reason" = "error" ]; then
    35→        echo -e "  ${RED}Ralph Session Ended (Error)${NC}"
    36→    else
    37→        echo -e "  ${GREEN}Ralph Session Complete${NC}"
    38→    fi
    39→    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    40→    echo ""
    41→
    42→    # Session stats
    43→    echo "  Session Details:"
    44→    echo "    Branch: $RALPH_BRANCH"
    45→    echo "    Iterations: $ITERATION"
    46→    echo "    Duration: ${duration_mins}m ${duration_secs}s"
    47→    echo "    Mode: $MODE"
    48→    echo ""
    49→
    50→    # Git summary
    51→    local commit_count=$(git rev-list --count "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    52→    if [ "$commit_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    53→        echo "  Work Completed:"
    54→        echo "    Commits: $commit_count"
    55→
    56→        # Show files changed
    57→        local files_changed=$(git diff --name-only "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    58→        if [ "$files_changed" -gt 0 ]; then
    59→            echo "    Files modified: $files_changed"
    60→
    61→            # Show top 5 most changed files
    62→            echo ""
    63→            echo "    Key changes:"
    64→            git diff --stat "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | head -6 | tail -5 | sed 's/^/      /'
    65→        fi
    66→
    67→        echo ""
    68→        echo "    Recent commits:"
    69→        git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | sed 's/^/      /'
    70→    else
    71→        echo "  No commits made during this session"
    72→    fi
    73→
    74→    # Implementation plan summary if exists
    75→    if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
    76→        local completed_count=$(grep -c "^## Completed" IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    77→        local current_count=$(grep -c "^## Current Focus" IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    78→        if [ "$completed_count" -gt 0 ] || [ "$current_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    79→            echo ""
    80→            echo "  Plan Status:"
    81→            echo "    See IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md for details"
    82→        fi
    83→    fi
    84→
    85→    # Next steps
    86→    echo ""
    87→    echo "  Next Steps:"
    88→    if [ "$commit_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    89→        echo "    1. Review changes: git diff ${ORIGINAL_BRANCH}...${RALPH_BRANCH}"
    90→        echo "    2. Test the changes in your environment"
    91→        echo "    3. Create PR: gh pr create --base ${ORIGINAL_BRANCH} --head ${RALPH_BRANCH}"
    92→    else
    93→        echo "    1. Review any analysis or plans created"
    94→        echo "    2. Consider running: ./ralph.sh build"
    95→    fi
    96→
    97→    echo ""
    98→    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    99→}
   100→
   101→# Open a PR and immediately merge it into the base branch
   102→auto_merge_pr() {
   103→    local commit_count
   104→    commit_count=$(git rev-list --count "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
   105→    if [ "$commit_count" -eq 0 ]; then
   106→        log_info "No commits on $RALPH_BRANCH — skipping PR"
   107→        return 0
   108→    fi
   109→
   110→    command -v gh &>/dev/null || { log_warn "gh CLI not found — skipping auto-merge"; return 0; }
   111→    [ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}" ] || { log_warn "GITHUB_TOKEN not set — skipping auto-merge"; return 0; }
   112→
   113→    local title
   114→    title="ralph: $(git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" | tail -1 | cut -d' ' -f2-)"
   115→    local body
   116→    body="$(printf 'Auto-merged by Ralph (%d iteration(s))\n\n' "$ITERATION")$(git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH")"
   117→
   118→    log_info "Creating PR: $RALPH_BRANCH -> $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
   119→    local pr_url
   120→    if pr_url=$(gh pr create --base "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" --head "$RALPH_BRANCH" --title "$title" --body "$body" 2>&1); then
   121→        log_success "PR created: $pr_url"
   122→        if gh pr merge "$pr_url" --merge --delete-branch 2>&1; then
   123→            log_success "PR merged into $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
   124→        else
   125→            log_warn "Auto-merge failed — review manually: $pr_url"
   126→        fi
   127→    else
   128→        log_warn "PR creation failed: $pr_url"
   129→    fi
   130→}
   131→
   132→# Cleanup scaffolding files
   133→cleanup_scaffolding() {
   134→    log_info "Cleaning up Ralph scaffolding files..."
   135→
   136→    local files_to_remove=()
   137→    local dirs_to_remove=()
   138→
   139→    # Check which scaffolding files exist
   140→    [ -d "specs" ] && dirs_to_remove+=("specs")
   141→    [ -f "AGENTS.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("AGENTS.md")
   142→    [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md")
   143→    [ -f "PROMPT_plan.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_plan.md")
   144→    [ -f "PROMPT_build.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_build.md")
   145→    [ -f "PROMPT_plan_local.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_plan_local.md")
   146→    [ -f "PROMPT_build_local.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_build_local.md")
   147→
   148→    if [ ${#files_to_remove[@]} -eq 0 ] && [ ${#dirs_to_remove[@]} -eq 0 ]; then
   149→        log_info "No scaffolding files to clean up"
   150→        return
   151→    fi
   152→
   153→    # Remove the files
   154→    for file in "${files_to_remove[@]}"; do
   155→        git rm -f "$file" 2>/dev/null || rm -f "$file"
   156→        log_info "  Removed: $file"
   157→    done
   158→
   159→    for dir in "${dirs_to_remove[@]}"; do
   160→        git rm -rf "$dir" 2>/dev/null || rm -rf "$dir"
   161→        log_info "  Removed: $dir/"
   162→    done
   163→
   164→    # Create cleanup commit if there are changes
   165→    if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
   166→        log_info "Creating cleanup commit..."
   167→        git commit -m "chore: Remove Ralph scaffolding files
   168→
   169→These files were used during the Ralph development session
   170→and are no longer needed for the final pull request."
   171→
   172→        # Push if enabled
   173→        if [ "$PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT" = "true" ]; then
   174→            log_info "Pushing cleanup commit..."
   175→            git push origin "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || \
   176→                git push -u origin "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || \
   177→                log_warn "Push failed (continuing anyway)"
   178→        fi
   179→    fi
   180→}
   181→
   182→# Handle interruption gracefully
   183→handle_interruption() {
   184→    echo ""
   185→    log_warn "Ralph loop interrupted by user (Ctrl+C)"
   186→    generate_work_summary "interrupted"
   187→    /home/ralph/scripts/send-notification.sh "interrupted" "$RALPH_BRANCH" "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" "$ITERATION" "$(( $(date +%s) - SESSION_START ))"
   188→    exit 130
   189→}
   190→
   191→# Set up signal trap for graceful interruption
   192→trap 'handle_interruption' INT TERM
   193→
   194→# Check if Entire CLI is available and enabled
   195→entire_available() {
   196→    [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ] && command -v entire &>/dev/null
   197→}
   198→
   199→# Change to workspace directory
   200→cd "${RALPH_WORKSPACE:-/home/ralph/workspace}"
   201→
   202→# Configuration from environment
   203→MODE="${RALPH_MODE:-build}"
   204→MAX_ITERATIONS="${RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS:-0}"
   205→MODEL="${RALPH_MODEL:-opus}"
   206→OUTPUT_FORMAT="${RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-plain}"
   207→PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT="${RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT:-true}"
   208→SPEND_CEILING_USD="${RALPH_SPEND_CEILING_USD:-0}"
   209→
   210→# Determine prompt file
   211→case "$MODE" in
   212→    plan)
   213→        PROMPT_FILE="/home/ralph/prompts/PROMPT_plan.md"
   214→        ;;
   215→    build|*)
   216→        PROMPT_FILE="/home/ralph/prompts/PROMPT_build.md"
   217→        ;;
   218→esac
   219→
   220→# Check if using local model (Ollama) - prefer _local variants
   221→IS_LOCAL_MODEL=false
   222→if [[ "$MODEL" == ollama/* ]] || [[ -n "${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}" && "${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}" != *"anthropic.com"* ]]; then
   223→    IS_LOCAL_MODEL=true
   224→fi
   225→
   226→# Check for project-specific prompts (prefer _local for local models)
   227→if [ "$IS_LOCAL_MODEL" = true ] && [ -f "PROMPT_${MODE}_local.md" ]; then
   228→    PROMPT_FILE="PROMPT_${MODE}_local.md"
   229→    log_info "Using local model prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
   230→elif [ -f "PROMPT_${MODE}.md" ]; then
   231→    PROMPT_FILE="PROMPT_${MODE}.md"
   232→    log_info "Using project prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
   233→fi
   234→
   235→# Verify prompt exists
   236→if [ ! -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then
   237→    log_error "Prompt file not found: $PROMPT_FILE"
   238→    exit 1
   239→fi
   240→
   241→# Read prompt content now (before any git operations that might stash/remove files)
   242→PROMPT_CONTENT=$(cat "$PROMPT_FILE")
   243→
   244→# Build model argument
   245→MODEL_ARG="--model $MODEL"
   246→
   247→# Iteration counter
   248→ITERATION=0
   249→
   250→# Verify we're in a git repo
   251→if ! git rev-parse --git-dir &>/dev/null; then
   252→    log_error "Not a git repository!"
   253→    log_error "Initialize with: git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial commit'"
   254→    exit 1
   255→fi
   256→
   257→# Get the workspace name from directory
   258→WORKSPACE_NAME=$(basename "$(pwd)")
   259→
   260→# Create a new branch for this Ralph session
   261→TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
   262→RALPH_BRANCH="ralph/${WORKSPACE_NAME}-${TIMESTAMP}"
   263→ORIGINAL_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "HEAD")
   264→
   265→# Guard: if we're on a stale ralph branch, switch to main before proceeding
   266→if [[ "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" == ralph/* ]]; then
   267→    log_warn "Currently on stale ralph branch: $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
   268→    log_info "Switching to main before starting new session..."
   269→    DEFAULT_BRANCH=$(git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||' || echo "main")
   270→    if ! git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
   271→        log_warn "Committing uncommitted changes before switching branches..."
   272→        git add -A && git commit -m "wip: uncommitted changes from previous session" 2>/dev/null || true
   273→        git push origin "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true
   274→    fi
   275→    if git checkout "$DEFAULT_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; then
   276→        ORIGINAL_BRANCH="$DEFAULT_BRANCH"
   277→        log_info "Switched to $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
   278→    else
   279→        log_error "Failed to switch to $DEFAULT_BRANCH — run: git checkout main && git pull"
   280→        exit 1
   281→    fi
   282→fi
   283→
   284→# Warn if main is behind origin so we don't silently work on stale code
   285→if git fetch origin "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" --dry-run 2>/dev/null; then
   286→    LOCAL=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null)
   287→    REMOTE=$(git rev-parse "origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true)
   288→    if [ -n "$REMOTE" ] && [ "$LOCAL" != "$REMOTE" ]; then
   289→        BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count HEAD.."origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
   290→        if [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ]; then
   291→            log_warn "Branch is $BEHIND commit(s) behind origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH — consider running: git pull"
   292→        fi
   293→    fi
   294→fi
   295→
   296→# Check for uncommitted changes
   297→DID_STASH=false
   298→if ! git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- 2>/dev/null; then
   299→    log_warn "Uncommitted changes detected"
   300→    log_info "Stashing changes before creating branch..."
   301→    git stash push -m "Ralph auto-stash before $RALPH_BRANCH"
   302→    DID_STASH=true
   303→fi
   304→
   305→# Create and checkout the new branch
   306→log_info "Creating branch: $RALPH_BRANCH"
   307→if ! git checkout -b "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; then
   308→    log_error "Failed to create branch $RALPH_BRANCH"
   309→    exit 1
   310→fi
   311→
   312→# Capture HEAD before any agent commits so iteration diffs are scoped correctly
   313→SESSION_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "")
   314→
   315→# Restore stashed changes onto the new branch so scaffolding files are available
   316→if [ "$DID_STASH" = true ]; then
   317→    log_info "Restoring stashed changes onto $RALPH_BRANCH..."
   318→    git stash pop 2>/dev/null || log_warn "Stash pop failed (changes may conflict)"
   319→fi
   320→
   321→log_info "Starting loop..."
   322→log_info "Prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
   323→log_info "Model: $MODEL"
   324→log_info "Branch: $RALPH_BRANCH (from $ORIGINAL_BRANCH)"
   325→log_info "Working dir: $(pwd)"
   326→
   327→SESSION_ID="$TIMESTAMP"
   328→if node /home/ralph/workspace/lib/session-logger.js init \
   329→    --session-id "$SESSION_ID" \
   330→    --branch "$RALPH_BRANCH" \
   331→    --original-branch "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" \
   332→    --mode "$MODE" \
   333→    --model "$MODEL" \
   334→    --max-iterations "$MAX_ITERATIONS" \
   335→    --head-at-start "$SESSION_HEAD" 2>/dev/null; then
   336→    log_info "Session log: logs/sessions/${SESSION_ID}.json"
   337→else
   338→    log_warn "Session logging unavailable (continuing without it)"
   339→fi
   340→
   341→# Check for IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
   342→if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
   343→    log_info "Found IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md - will continue from existing progress"
   344→else
   345→    log_warn "No IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md found - Ralph will create one"
   346→fi
   347→echo ""
   348→
   349→# Temp file for capturing output
   350→OUTPUT_TMP=$(mktemp)
   351→trap 'rm -f "$OUTPUT_TMP"' EXIT
   352→
   353→# Output formatting command
   354→format_output() {
   355→    if [ "$OUTPUT_FORMAT" = "pretty" ]; then
   356→        /home/ralph/scripts/format-output.sh
   357→    else
   358→        cat
   359→    fi
   360→}
   361→
   362→# Check for critical errors in output
   363→# Only check the result JSON line, not the full conversation
   364→check_for_errors() {
   365→    local output_file="$1"
   366→
   367→    # Extract just the final result line (contains "type":"result")
   368→    local result_line
   369→    result_line=$(grep '"type":"result"' "$output_file" 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
   370→
   371→    # If no result line, check for startup errors in full output
   372→    if [[ -z "$result_line" ]]; then
   373→        # Check for model not found during startup (LiteLLM specific error)
   374→        if grep -q "OllamaException.*not found\|litellm.*model.*not found" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
   375→            log_error "Model not found: $MODEL"
   376→            echo ""
   377→            log_error "Available models - check litellm-config.yaml or run: ollama list"
   378→            return 1
   379→        fi
   380→
   381→        # Check for connection errors
   382→        if grep -q "APIConnectionError\|Connection refused\|ECONNREFUSED" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
   383→            log_error "Connection error - is Ollama running?"
   384→            return 1
   385→        fi
   386→    fi
   387→
   388→    # Check result line for errors
   389→    if [[ -n "$result_line" ]]; then
   390→        if echo "$result_line" | grep -q '"is_error":true'; then
   391→            # Extract error message if present
   392→            local errors
   393→            errors=$(echo "$result_line" | grep -o '"errors":\[[^]]*\]' | head -1)
   394→            if [[ -n "$errors" ]]; then
   395→                log_warn "Session completed with errors"
   396→                # Don't fail - Ralph might have partially succeeded
   397→            fi
   398→        fi
   399→    fi
   400→
   401→    return 0
   402→}
   403→
   404→# Main loop
   405→log_info "Max iterations: $MAX_ITERATIONS (ITERATION starts at $ITERATION)"
   406→while true; do
   407→    # Check iteration limit
   408→    if [ "$MAX_ITERATIONS" -gt 0 ] && [ "$ITERATION" -ge "$MAX_ITERATIONS" ]; then
   409→        echo ""
   410→        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
   411→        log_success "Reached max iterations: $MAX_ITERATIONS"
   412→        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
   413→        break
   414→    fi
   415→
   416→    ITERATION=$((ITERATION + 1))
   417→    echo ""
   418→    echo "┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐"
   419→    echo "│  ITERATION $ITERATION                                  │"
   420→    echo "└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘"
   421→    echo ""
   422→
   423→    ITER_START_MS=$(date +%s%3N)
   424→    ITER_PREV_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "")
   425→
   426→    # Run Claude with the prompt, capture output for error checking
   427→    # -p: Headless mode (non-interactive)
   428→    # --dangerously-skip-permissions: Auto-approve tool calls
   429→    # --output-format=stream-json: Structured output for filtering
   430→    echo "$PROMPT_CONTENT" | claude -p \
   431→        --dangerously-skip-permissions \
   432→        --output-format=stream-json \
   433→        $MODEL_ARG \
   434→        --verbose 2>&1 | tee "$OUTPUT_TMP" | format_output
   435→
   436→    CLAUDE_EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
   437→    ITER_END_MS=$(date +%s%3N)
   438→    ITER_DURATION_MS=$((ITER_END_MS - ITER_START_MS))
   439→
   440→    # Log structured iteration data (non-blocking)
   441→    node /home/ralph/workspace/lib/session-logger.js iteration \
   442→        --session-id "$SESSION_ID" \
   443→        --iteration "$ITERATION" \
   444→        --model "$MODEL" \
   445→        --duration-ms "$ITER_DURATION_MS" \
   446→        --prev-commit "$ITER_PREV_COMMIT" \
   447→        "$OUTPUT_TMP" 2>/dev/null || true
   448→
   449→    # Check spend ceiling
   450→    if [ "$SPEND_CEILING_USD" != "0" ] && [ -n "$SPEND_CEILING_USD" ]; then
   451→        spend_output=$(node /home/ralph/workspace/lib/session-logger.js check-spend \
   452→            --session-id "$SESSION_ID" \
   453→            --ceiling "$SPEND_CEILING_USD" 2>/dev/null)
   454→        spend_exit=$?
   455→        if [ $spend_exit -eq 2 ]; then
   456→            log_warn "Spend ceiling reached: $spend_output"
   457→            generate_work_summary "error"
   458→            /home/ralph/scripts/send-notification.sh "spend-limit" "$RALPH_BRANCH" "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" "$ITERATION" "$(( $(date +%s) - SESSION_START ))"
   459→            exit 1
   460→        fi
   461→    fi
   462→
   463→    # Check for critical errors
   464→    if ! check_for_errors "$OUTPUT_TMP"; then
   465→        log_error "Critical error detected, stopping loop"
   466→        echo ""
   467→        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
   468→        echo "  Raw error output:"
   469→        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
   470→        # Show last 50 lines of raw output for debugging
   471→        tail -50 "$OUTPUT_TMP"
   472→        generate_work_summary "error"
   473→        exit 1
   474→    fi
   475→
   476→    if [ "$CLAUDE_EXIT" -ne 0 ]; then
   477→        log_warn "Claude exited with code $CLAUDE_EXIT"
   478→        # Show some context on non-zero exit
   479→        echo "Last output:"
   480→        tail -20 "$OUTPUT_TMP"
   481→    fi
   482→
   483→    # Push changes if configured
   484→    if [ "$PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT" = "true" ]; then
   485→        CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "")
   486→        if [ -n "$CURRENT_BRANCH" ]; then
   487→            log_info "Pushing to origin/$CURRENT_BRANCH..."
   488→            push_output=""
   489→            if push_output=$(git push origin "$CURRENT_BRANCH" 2>&1); then
   490→                log_success "Push successful"
   491→            elif push_output=$(git push -u origin "$CURRENT_BRANCH" 2>&1); then
   492→                log_success "Push successful (set upstream)"
   493→            else
   494→                log_warn "Push failed (continuing anyway)"
   495→                # Check for common SSH issues
   496→                if echo "$push_output" | grep -q "authenticity of host\|Host key verification"; then
   497→                    log_warn "SSH host key not trusted. Run on host machine:"
   498→                    log_warn "  ssh-keyscan <git-host> >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts"
   499→                elif echo "$push_output" | grep -q "Permission denied\|publickey"; then
   500→                    log_warn "SSH key issue. Ensure ~/.ssh is mounted and keys have correct permissions"
   501→                else
   502→                    echo "$push_output" | head -5
   503→                fi
   504→            fi
   505→        fi
   506→    else
   507→        log_info "Push disabled (RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT=false)"
   508→    fi
   509→
   510→    echo ""
   511→    echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════"
   512→    log_success "ITERATION $ITERATION COMPLETE"
   513→    if entire_available; then
   514→        checkpoint_info=$(entire status --short 2>/dev/null) && \
   515→            log_info "Entire: $checkpoint_info" || true
   516→    fi
   517→    echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════"
   518→    echo ""
   519→
   520→    # Check if all tasks in IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md are complete
   521→    if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
   522→        pending_tasks=$(grep -c '^\s*- \[ \]' IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
   523→        completed_tasks=$(grep -c '^\s*- \[x\]' IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
   524→        if [ "$pending_tasks" -eq 0 ] && [ "$completed_tasks" -gt 0 ]; then
   525→            echo ""
   526→            log_success "All tasks complete ($completed_tasks done, 0 pending) — stopping early"
   527→            break
   528→        else
   529→            log_info "Plan status: $completed_tasks done, $pending_tasks pending"
   530→        fi
   531→    fi
   532→
   533→    # Small delay between iterations
   534→    sleep 1
   535→done
   536→
   537→# Generate work summary
   538→generate_work_summary "completed"
   539→
   540→# Clean up scaffolding files if configured
   541→if [ "${RALPH_CLEANUP_SCAFFOLDING:-true}" = "true" ]; then
   542→    cleanup_scaffolding
   543→else
   544→    log_info "Scaffolding cleanup disabled (RALPH_CLEANUP_SCAFFOLDING=false)"
   545→fi
   546→
   547→auto_merge_pr
   548→
   549→/home/ralph/scripts/send-notification.sh "completed" "$RALPH_BRANCH" "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" "$ITERATION" "$(( $(date +%s) - SESSION_START ))"
   550→
   551→echo ""
   552→log_success "Loop finished after $ITERATION iterations"
   553→

#!/bin/bash
# Ralph Loop - Main loop script with output formatting
# Runs inside the Docker container

set -euo pipefail

# Track start time for session duration
SESSION_START=$(date +%s)

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }
log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[ralph]${NC} $1"; }

# Generate work summary
generate_work_summary() {
    local exit_reason="${1:-completed}"
    local session_end=$(date +%s)
    local duration=$((session_end - SESSION_START))
    local duration_mins=$((duration / 60))
    local duration_secs=$((duration % 60))

    echo ""
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    if [ "$exit_reason" = "interrupted" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Ralph Session Interrupted${NC}"
    elif [ "$exit_reason" = "error" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${RED}Ralph Session Ended (Error)${NC}"
    else
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}Ralph Session Complete${NC}"
    fi
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    echo ""

    # Session stats
    echo "  Session Details:"
    echo "    Branch: $RALPH_BRANCH"
    echo "    Iterations: $ITERATION"
    echo "    Duration: ${duration_mins}m ${duration_secs}s"
    echo "    Mode: $MODE"
    echo ""

    # Git summary
    local commit_count=$(git rev-list --count "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    if [ "$commit_count" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "  Work Completed:"
        echo "    Commits: $commit_count"

        # Show files changed
        local files_changed=$(git diff --name-only "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
        if [ "$files_changed" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo "    Files modified: $files_changed"

            # Show top 5 most changed files
            echo ""
            echo "    Key changes:"
            git diff --stat "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | head -6 | tail -5 | sed 's/^/      /'
        fi

        echo ""
        echo "    Recent commits:"
        git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | sed 's/^/      /'
    else
        echo "  No commits made during this session"
    fi

    # Implementation plan summary if exists
    if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
        local completed_count=$(grep -c "^## Completed" IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        local current_count=$(grep -c "^## Current Focus" IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        if [ "$completed_count" -gt 0 ] || [ "$current_count" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo ""
            echo "  Plan Status:"
            echo "    See IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md for details"
        fi
    fi

    # Next steps
    echo ""
    echo "  Next Steps:"
    if [ "$commit_count" -gt 0 ]; then
        echo "    1. Review changes: git diff ${ORIGINAL_BRANCH}...${RALPH_BRANCH}"
        echo "    2. Test the changes in your environment"
        echo "    3. Create PR: gh pr create --base ${ORIGINAL_BRANCH} --head ${RALPH_BRANCH}"
    else
        echo "    1. Review any analysis or plans created"
        echo "    2. Consider running: ./ralph.sh build"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
}

# Open a PR and immediately merge it into the base branch
auto_merge_pr() {
    local commit_count
    commit_count=$(git rev-list --count "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    if [ "$commit_count" -eq 0 ]; then
        log_info "No commits on $RALPH_BRANCH — skipping PR"
        return 0
    fi

    command -v gh &>/dev/null || { log_warn "gh CLI not found — skipping auto-merge"; return 0; }
    [ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN:-}" ] || { log_warn "GITHUB_TOKEN not set — skipping auto-merge"; return 0; }

    local title
    title="ralph: $(git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH" | tail -1 | cut -d' ' -f2-)"
    local body
    body="$(printf 'Auto-merged by Ralph (%d iteration(s))\n\n' "$ITERATION")$(git log --oneline "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH".."$RALPH_BRANCH")"

    log_info "Creating PR: $RALPH_BRANCH -> $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
    local pr_url
    if pr_url=$(gh pr create --base "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" --head "$RALPH_BRANCH" --title "$title" --body "$body" 2>&1); then
        log_success "PR created: $pr_url"
        if gh pr merge "$pr_url" --merge --delete-branch 2>&1; then
            log_success "PR merged into $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
        else
            log_warn "Auto-merge failed — review manually: $pr_url"
        fi
    else
        log_warn "PR creation failed: $pr_url"
    fi
}

# Cleanup scaffolding files
cleanup_scaffolding() {
    log_info "Cleaning up Ralph scaffolding files..."

    local files_to_remove=()
    local dirs_to_remove=()

    # Check which scaffolding files exist
    [ -d "specs" ] && dirs_to_remove+=("specs")
    [ -f "AGENTS.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("AGENTS.md")
    [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md")
    [ -f "PROMPT_plan.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_plan.md")
    [ -f "PROMPT_build.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_build.md")
    [ -f "PROMPT_plan_local.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_plan_local.md")
    [ -f "PROMPT_build_local.md" ] && files_to_remove+=("PROMPT_build_local.md")

    if [ ${#files_to_remove[@]} -eq 0 ] && [ ${#dirs_to_remove[@]} -eq 0 ]; then
        log_info "No scaffolding files to clean up"
        return
    fi

    # Remove the files
    for file in "${files_to_remove[@]}"; do
        git rm -f "$file" 2>/dev/null || rm -f "$file"
        log_info "  Removed: $file"
    done

    for dir in "${dirs_to_remove[@]}"; do
        git rm -rf "$dir" 2>/dev/null || rm -rf "$dir"
        log_info "  Removed: $dir/"
    done

    # Create cleanup commit if there are changes
    if ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
        log_info "Creating cleanup commit..."
        git commit -m "chore: Remove Ralph scaffolding files

These files were used during the Ralph development session
and are no longer needed for the final pull request."

        # Push if enabled
        if [ "$PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT" = "true" ]; then
            log_info "Pushing cleanup commit..."
            git push origin "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || \
                git push -u origin "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || \
                log_warn "Push failed (continuing anyway)"
        fi
    fi
}

# Handle interruption gracefully
handle_interruption() {
    echo ""
    log_warn "Ralph loop interrupted by user (Ctrl+C)"
    generate_work_summary "interrupted"
    /home/ralph/scripts/send-notification.sh "interrupted" "$RALPH_BRANCH" "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" "$ITERATION" "$(( $(date +%s) - SESSION_START ))"
    exit 130
}

# Set up signal trap for graceful interruption
trap 'handle_interruption' INT TERM

# Check if Entire CLI is available and enabled
entire_available() {
    [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ] && command -v entire &>/dev/null
}

# Change to workspace directory
cd "${RALPH_WORKSPACE:-/home/ralph/workspace}"

# Configuration from environment
MODE="${RALPH_MODE:-build}"
MAX_ITERATIONS="${RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS:-0}"
MODEL="${RALPH_MODEL:-opus}"
OUTPUT_FORMAT="${RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-plain}"
PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT="${RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT:-true}"
SPEND_CEILING_USD="${RALPH_SPEND_CEILING_USD:-0}"

# Determine prompt file
case "$MODE" in
    plan)
        PROMPT_FILE="/home/ralph/prompts/PROMPT_plan.md"
        ;;
    build|*)
        PROMPT_FILE="/home/ralph/prompts/PROMPT_build.md"
        ;;
esac

# Check if using local model (Ollama) - prefer _local variants
IS_LOCAL_MODEL=false
if [[ "$MODEL" == ollama/* ]] || [[ -n "${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}" && "${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}" != *"anthropic.com"* ]]; then
    IS_LOCAL_MODEL=true
fi

# Check for project-specific prompts (prefer _local for local models)
if [ "$IS_LOCAL_MODEL" = true ] && [ -f "PROMPT_${MODE}_local.md" ]; then
    PROMPT_FILE="PROMPT_${MODE}_local.md"
    log_info "Using local model prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
elif [ -f "PROMPT_${MODE}.md" ]; then
    PROMPT_FILE="PROMPT_${MODE}.md"
    log_info "Using project prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
fi

# Verify prompt exists
if [ ! -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then
    log_error "Prompt file not found: $PROMPT_FILE"
    exit 1
fi

# Read prompt content now (before any git operations that might stash/remove files)
PROMPT_CONTENT=$(cat "$PROMPT_FILE")

# Build model argument
MODEL_ARG="--model $MODEL"

# Iteration counter
ITERATION=0

# Verify we're in a git repo
if ! git rev-parse --git-dir &>/dev/null; then
    log_error "Not a git repository!"
    log_error "Initialize with: git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial commit'"
    exit 1
fi

# Get the workspace name from directory
WORKSPACE_NAME=$(basename "$(pwd)")

# Create a new branch for this Ralph session
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
RALPH_BRANCH="ralph/${WORKSPACE_NAME}-${TIMESTAMP}"
ORIGINAL_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "HEAD")

# Guard: if we're on a stale ralph branch, switch to main before proceeding
if [[ "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" == ralph/* ]]; then
    log_warn "Currently on stale ralph branch: $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
    log_info "Switching to main before starting new session..."
    DEFAULT_BRANCH=$(git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | sed 's|refs/remotes/origin/||' || echo "main")
    if ! git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || ! git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then
        log_warn "Committing uncommitted changes before switching branches..."
        git add -A && git commit -m "wip: uncommitted changes from previous session" 2>/dev/null || true
        git push origin "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true
    fi
    if git checkout "$DEFAULT_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; then
        ORIGINAL_BRANCH="$DEFAULT_BRANCH"
        log_info "Switched to $ORIGINAL_BRANCH"
    else
        log_error "Failed to switch to $DEFAULT_BRANCH — run: git checkout main && git pull"
        exit 1
    fi
fi

# Warn if main is behind origin so we don't silently work on stale code
if git fetch origin "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" --dry-run 2>/dev/null; then
    LOCAL=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null)
    REMOTE=$(git rev-parse "origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true)
    if [ -n "$REMOTE" ] && [ "$LOCAL" != "$REMOTE" ]; then
        BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count HEAD.."origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        if [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ]; then
            log_warn "Branch is $BEHIND commit(s) behind origin/$ORIGINAL_BRANCH — consider running: git pull"
        fi
    fi
fi

# Check for uncommitted changes
DID_STASH=false
if ! git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- 2>/dev/null; then
    log_warn "Uncommitted changes detected"
    log_info "Stashing changes before creating branch..."
    git stash push -m "Ralph auto-stash before $RALPH_BRANCH"
    DID_STASH=true
fi

# Create and checkout the new branch
log_info "Creating branch: $RALPH_BRANCH"
if ! git checkout -b "$RALPH_BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; then
    log_error "Failed to create branch $RALPH_BRANCH"
    exit 1
fi

# Capture HEAD before any agent commits so iteration diffs are scoped correctly
SESSION_HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "")

# Restore stashed changes onto the new branch so scaffolding files are available
if [ "$DID_STASH" = true ]; then
    log_info "Restoring stashed changes onto $RALPH_BRANCH..."
    git stash pop 2>/dev/null || log_warn "Stash pop failed (changes may conflict)"
fi

log_info "Starting loop..."
log_info "Prompt: $PROMPT_FILE"
log_info "Model: $MODEL"
log_info "Branch: $RALPH_BRANCH (from $ORIGINAL_BRANCH)"
log_info "Working dir: $(pwd)"

SESSION_ID="$TIMESTAMP"
if node /home/ralph/workspace/lib/session-logger.js init \
    --session-id "$SESSION_ID" \
    --branch "$RALPH_BRANCH" \
    --original-branch "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" \
    --mode "$MODE" \
    --model "$MODEL" \
    --max-iterations "$MAX_ITERATIONS" \
    --head-at-start "$SESSION_HEAD" 2>/dev/null; then
    log_info "Session log: logs/sessions/${SESSION_ID}.json"
else
    log_warn "Session logging unavailable (continuing without it)"
fi

# Check for IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
    log_info "Found IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md - will continue from existing progress"
else
    log_warn "No IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md found - Ralph will create one"
fi
echo ""

# Temp file for capturing output
OUTPUT_TMP=$(mktemp)
trap 'rm -f "$OUTPUT_TMP"' EXIT

# Output formatting command
format_output() {
    if [ "$OUTPUT_FORMAT" = "pretty" ]; then
        /home/ralph/scripts/format-output.sh
    else
        cat
    fi
}

# Check for critical errors in output
# Only check the result JSON line, not the full conversation
check_for_errors() {
    local output_file="$1"

    # Extract just the final result line (contains "type":"result")
    local result_line
    result_line=$(grep '"type":"result"' "$output_file" 2>/dev/null | tail -1)

    # If no result line, check for startup errors in full output
    if [[ -z "$result_line" ]]; then
        # Check for model not found during startup (LiteLLM specific error)
        if grep -q "OllamaException.*not found\|litellm.*model.*not found" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
            log_error "Model not found: $MODEL"
            echo ""
            log_error "Available models - check litellm-config.yaml or run: ollama list"
            return 1
        fi

        # Check for connection errors
        if grep -q "APIConnectionError\|Connection refused\|ECONNREFUSED" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
            log_error "Connection error - is Ollama running?"
            return 1
        fi
    fi

    # Check result line for errors
    if [[ -n "$result_line" ]]; then
        if echo "$result_line" | grep -q '"is_error":true'; then
            # Extract error message if present
            local errors
            errors=$(echo "$result_line" | grep -o '"errors":\[[^]]*\]' | head -1)
            if [[ -n "$errors" ]]; then
                log_warn "Session completed with errors"
                # Don't fail - Ralph might have partially succeeded
            fi
        fi
    fi

    return 0
}

# Main loop
log_info "Max iterations: $MAX_ITERATIONS (ITERATION starts at $ITERATION)"
while true; do
    # Check iteration limit
    if [ "$MAX_ITERATIONS" -gt 0 ] && [ "$ITERATION" -ge "$MAX_ITERATIONS" ]; then
        echo ""
        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        log_success "Reached max iterations: $MAX_ITERATIONS"
        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        break
    fi

    ITERATION=$((ITERATION + 1))
    echo ""
    echo "┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐"
    echo "│  ITERATION $ITERATION                                  │"
    echo "└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘"
    echo ""

    ITER_START_MS=$(date +%s%3N)
    ITER_PREV_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "")

    # Run Claude with the prompt, capture output for error checking
    # -p: Headless mode (non-interactive)
    # --dangerously-skip-permissions: Auto-approve tool calls
    # --output-format=stream-json: Structured output for filtering
    echo "$PROMPT_CONTENT" | claude -p \
        --dangerously-skip-permissions \
        --output-format=stream-json \
        $MODEL_ARG \
        --verbose 2>&1 | tee "$OUTPUT_TMP" | format_output

    CLAUDE_EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
    ITER_END_MS=$(date +%s%3N)
    ITER_DURATION_MS=$((ITER_END_MS - ITER_START_MS))

    # Log structured iteration data (non-blocking)
    node /home/ralph/workspace/lib/session-logger.js iteration \
        --session-id "$SESSION_ID" \
        --iteration "$ITERATION" \
        --model "$MODEL" \
        --duration-ms "$ITER_DURATION_MS" \
        --prev-commit "$ITER_PREV_COMMIT" \
        "$OUTPUT_TMP" 2>/dev/null || true

    # Check spend ceiling
    if [ "$SPEND_CEILING_USD" != "0" ] && [ -n "$SPEND_CEILING_USD" ]; then
        spend_output=$(node /home/ralph/workspace/lib/session-logger.js check-spend \
            --session-id "$SESSION_ID" \
            --ceiling "$SPEND_CEILING_USD" 2>/dev/null)
        spend_exit=$?
        if [ $spend_exit -eq 2 ]; then
            log_warn "Spend ceiling reached: $spend_output"
            generate_work_summary "error"
            /home/ralph/scripts/send-notification.sh "spend-limit" "$RALPH_BRANCH" "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" "$ITERATION" "$(( $(date +%s) - SESSION_START ))"
            exit 1
        fi
    fi

    # Check for critical errors
    if ! check_for_errors "$OUTPUT_TMP"; then
        log_error "Critical error detected, stopping loop"
        echo ""
        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        echo "  Raw error output:"
        echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        # Show last 50 lines of raw output for debugging
        tail -50 "$OUTPUT_TMP"
        generate_work_summary "error"
        exit 1
    fi

    if [ "$CLAUDE_EXIT" -ne 0 ]; then
        log_warn "Claude exited with code $CLAUDE_EXIT"
        # Show some context on non-zero exit
        echo "Last output:"
        tail -20 "$OUTPUT_TMP"
    fi

    # Push changes if configured
    if [ "$PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT" = "true" ]; then
        CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "")
        if [ -n "$CURRENT_BRANCH" ]; then
            log_info "Pushing to origin/$CURRENT_BRANCH..."
            push_output=""
            if push_output=$(git push origin "$CURRENT_BRANCH" 2>&1); then
                log_success "Push successful"
            elif push_output=$(git push -u origin "$CURRENT_BRANCH" 2>&1); then
                log_success "Push successful (set upstream)"
            else
                log_warn "Push failed (continuing anyway)"
                # Check for common SSH issues
                if echo "$push_output" | grep -q "authenticity of host\|Host key verification"; then
                    log_warn "SSH host key not trusted. Run on host machine:"
                    log_warn "  ssh-keyscan <git-host> >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts"
                elif echo "$push_output" | grep -q "Permission denied\|publickey"; then
                    log_warn "SSH key issue. Ensure ~/.ssh is mounted and keys have correct permissions"
                else
                    echo "$push_output" | head -5
                fi
            fi
        fi
    else
        log_info "Push disabled (RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT=false)"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════"
    log_success "ITERATION $ITERATION COMPLETE"
    if entire_available; then
        checkpoint_info=$(entire status --short 2>/dev/null) && \
            log_info "Entire: $checkpoint_info" || true
    fi
    echo "════════════════════════════════════════════════"
    echo ""

    # Check if all tasks in IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md are complete
    if [ -f "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]; then
        pending_tasks=$(grep -c '^\s*- \[ \]' IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        completed_tasks=$(grep -c '^\s*- \[x\]' IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        if [ "$pending_tasks" -eq 0 ] && [ "$completed_tasks" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo ""
            log_success "All tasks complete ($completed_tasks done, 0 pending) — stopping early"
            break
        else
            log_info "Plan status: $completed_tasks done, $pending_tasks pending"
        fi
    fi

    # Small delay between iterations
    sleep 1
done

# Generate work summary
generate_work_summary "completed"

# Clean up scaffolding files if configured
if [ "${RALPH_CLEANUP_SCAFFOLDING:-true}" = "true" ]; then
    cleanup_scaffolding
else
    log_info "Scaffolding cleanup disabled (RALPH_CLEANUP_SCAFFOLDING=false)"
fi

auto_merge_pr

/home/ralph/scripts/send-notification.sh "completed" "$RALPH_BRANCH" "$ORIGINAL_BRANCH" "$ITERATION" "$(( $(date +%s) - SESSION_START ))"

echo ""
log_success "Loop finished after $ITERATION iterations"

#!/bin/bash
# Send a post-session summary email via SMTP_USER credentials.
# Called by loop.sh at the end of each session (normal or interrupted).
# Args: exit_reason branch original_branch iterations duration_secs
# No-ops silently if SMTP vars are unset.

EXIT_REASON="${1:-completed}"
BRANCH="${2:-unknown}"
ORIGINAL_BRANCH="${3:-main}"
ITERATIONS="${4:-0}"
DURATION_SECS="${5:-0}"

[ -z "${SMTP_HOST:-}" ] && exit 0
[ -z "${SMTP_USER:-}" ] && exit 0
[ -z "${SMTP_PASS:-}" ] && exit 0

MINS=$(( DURATION_SECS / 60 ))
SECS=$(( DURATION_SECS % 60 ))
COMMIT_COUNT=$(git rev-list --count "${ORIGINAL_BRANCH}..${BRANCH}" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
SUBJECT="[ralph] ${EXIT_REASON}: ${BRANCH} (${COMMIT_COUNT} commits, ${MINS}m ${SECS}s)"

BODY="Branch:     ${BRANCH}
Mode:       ${RALPH_MODE:-build}
Iterations: ${ITERATIONS}
Duration:   ${MINS}m ${SECS}s
Commits:    ${COMMIT_COUNT}
"

if [ "$EXIT_REASON" = "spend-limit" ]; then
    BODY+="
SPEND CEILING REACHED — loop stopped at iteration ${ITERATIONS}.
Set RALPH_SPEND_CEILING_USD to adjust or disable the limit.
"
fi

RECENT_COMMITS=$(git log "${ORIGINAL_BRANCH}..${BRANCH}" --oneline 2>/dev/null | head -10)
if [ -n "$RECENT_COMMITS" ]; then
    BODY+="
Commits:
${RECENT_COMMITS}
"
fi

DIFF_STAT=$(git diff --stat "${ORIGINAL_BRANCH}..${BRANCH}" 2>/dev/null | tail -5)
if [ -n "$DIFF_STAT" ]; then
    BODY+="
${DIFF_STAT}
"
fi

if [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ] && git log entire/checkpoints/v1 --oneline -1 &>/dev/null; then
    BODY+="
---
Entire Decision Log

$(git log entire/checkpoints/v1 --oneline -20 2>/dev/null)

Latest checkpoint:
$(git show entire/checkpoints/v1 --stat 2>/dev/null | head -20)"
fi

{
    printf "From: Ralph <${SMTP_USER}>\r\n"
    printf "To: ${SMTP_USER}\r\n"
    printf "Subject: ${SUBJECT}\r\n"
    printf "\r\n"
    printf "%s\n" "$BODY"
} | curl --silent \
    --url "smtps://${SMTP_HOST}:${SMTP_PORT:-465}" \
    --ssl-reqd \
    --mail-from "${SMTP_USER}" \
    --mail-rcpt "${SMTP_USER}" \
    --user "${SMTP_USER}:${SMTP_PASS}" \
    --upload-file - 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "[ralph] Notification sent to ${SMTP_USER}" \
    || echo "[ralph] Notification failed (continuing)"

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→# Ralph Docker Entrypoint
     3→# Handles auth detection, command routing, and environment setup
     4→
     5→set -euo pipefail
     6→
     7→# Colors for output
     8→RED='\033[0;31m'
     9→GREEN='\033[0;32m'
    10→YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
    11→CYAN='\033[0;36m'
    12→NC='\033[0m' # No Color
    13→
    14→log_info() {
    15→    echo -e "${CYAN}[ralph]${NC} $1"
    16→}
    17→
    18→log_warn() {
    19→    echo -e "${YELLOW}[ralph]${NC} $1"
    20→}
    21→
    22→log_error() {
    23→    echo -e "${RED}[ralph]${NC} $1"
    24→}
    25→
    26→log_success() {
    27→    echo -e "${GREEN}[ralph]${NC} $1"
    28→}
    29→
    30→# Environment variable validation functions
    31→validate_ralph_mode() {
    32→    local mode="${RALPH_MODE:-}"
    33→    if [ -n "$mode" ] && [ "$mode" != "build" ] && [ "$mode" != "plan" ]; then
    34→        log_error "Invalid RALPH_MODE: '$mode'"
    35→        log_error "Valid values: build, plan"
    36→        log_error "Leave unset to use default: build"
    37→        return 1
    38→    fi
    39→}
    40→
    41→validate_ralph_output_format() {
    42→    local format="${RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-}"
    43→    if [ -n "$format" ] && [ "$format" != "pretty" ] && [ "$format" != "json" ]; then
    44→        log_error "Invalid RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT: '$format'"
    45→        log_error "Valid values: pretty, json"
    46→        log_error "Leave unset to use default: pretty"
    47→        return 1
    48→    fi
    49→}
    50→
    51→validate_ralph_max_iterations() {
    52→    local max_iter="${RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS:-}"
    53→    if [ -n "$max_iter" ]; then
    54→        # Check if it's a valid non-negative integer
    55→        if ! [[ "$max_iter" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
    56→            log_error "Invalid RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS: '$max_iter'"
    57→            log_error "Must be a non-negative integer (0 for unlimited)"
    58→            log_error "Leave unset to use default: 0"
    59→            return 1
    60→        fi
    61→    fi
    62→}
    63→
    64→validate_ralph_push_after_commit() {
    65→    local push="${RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT:-}"
    66→    if [ -n "$push" ] && [ "$push" != "true" ] && [ "$push" != "false" ]; then
    67→        log_error "Invalid RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT: '$push'"
    68→        log_error "Valid values: true, false"
    69→        log_error "Leave unset to use default: true"
    70→        return 1
    71→    fi
    72→}
    73→
    74→validate_ralph_model() {
    75→    local model="${RALPH_MODEL:-}"
    76→    if [ -n "$model" ]; then
    77→        # Allow common Claude model names or ollama/* pattern
    78→        case "$model" in
    79→            opus|sonnet|haiku|claude-*|ollama/*)
    80→                # Valid model names
    81→                ;;
    82→            *)
    83→                log_error "Invalid RALPH_MODEL: '$model'"
    84→                log_error "Valid values: opus, sonnet, haiku, claude-*, ollama/*"
    85→                log_error "Examples: opus, sonnet, claude-3-sonnet, ollama/llama2"
    86→                log_error "Leave unset to use default: opus"
    87→                return 1
    88→                ;;
    89→        esac
    90→    fi
    91→}
    92→
    93→# Validate all environment variables
    94→validate_environment() {
    95→    local validation_failed=false
    96→
    97→    if ! validate_ralph_mode; then
    98→        validation_failed=true
    99→    fi
   100→
   101→    if ! validate_ralph_output_format; then
   102→        validation_failed=true
   103→    fi
   104→
   105→    if ! validate_ralph_max_iterations; then
   106→        validation_failed=true
   107→    fi
   108→
   109→    if ! validate_ralph_push_after_commit; then
   110→        validation_failed=true
   111→    fi
   112→
   113→    if ! validate_ralph_model; then
   114→        validation_failed=true
   115→    fi
   116→
   117→    if [ "$validation_failed" = true ]; then
   118→        log_error "Environment variable validation failed"
   119→        log_error "Fix the above errors and try again"
   120→        return 1
   121→    fi
   122→}
   123→
   124→# Detect authentication mode
   125→detect_auth() {
   126→    local base_url="${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}"
   127→    local api_key="${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:-}"
   128→
   129→    # Check if using LiteLLM proxy (Ollama mode) - check both URL patterns and API key
   130→    if [[ "$base_url" == *"litellm"* ]] || [[ "$base_url" == *":4000"* ]]; then
   131→        log_info "Auth mode: LiteLLM proxy -> Ollama (local)"
   132→        return 0
   133→    elif [ -n "$api_key" ] && [ -n "$base_url" ]; then
   134→        log_info "Auth mode: API Key with custom base URL"
   135→        return 0
   136→    elif [ -n "$api_key" ]; then
   137→        log_info "Auth mode: API Key"
   138→        return 0
   139→    elif [ -f "$HOME/.claude/.credentials.json" ]; then
   140→        log_info "Auth mode: OAuth credentials file"
   141→        return 0
   142→    elif [ -f "$HOME/.claude/credentials.json" ]; then
   143→        log_info "Auth mode: OAuth credentials"
   144→        return 0
   145→    else
   146→        log_error "No authentication found!"
   147→        log_error "Option 1: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable"
   148→        log_error "Option 2: Run 'docker compose run --rm ralph login' to authenticate interactively"
   149→        log_error "For Ollama: Use --profile ollama with docker compose"
   150→        return 1
   151→    fi
   152→}
   153→
   154→# Wait for LiteLLM proxy to be ready
   155→wait_for_litellm() {
   156→    local base_url="${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}"
   157→    local api_key="${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:-}"
   158→
   159→    # Only wait if using LiteLLM
   160→    if [[ "$base_url" != *"litellm"* ]] && [[ "$base_url" != *":4000"* ]]; then
   161→        return 0
   162→    fi
   163→
   164→    log_info "Waiting for LiteLLM proxy..."
   165→
   166→    local max_attempts=30
   167→    local attempt=1
   168→
   169→    while [ $attempt -le $max_attempts ]; do
   170→        # Try health endpoint with API key
   171→        if curl -sf -H "Authorization: Bearer ${api_key}" "${base_url}/health" &> /dev/null; then
   172→            echo ""
   173→            log_success "LiteLLM proxy is ready"
   174→            return 0
   175→        fi
   176→
   177→        echo -ne "\r${CYAN}[ralph]${NC} Waiting for LiteLLM... attempt $attempt/$max_attempts"
   178→        sleep 2
   179→        attempt=$((attempt + 1))
   180→    done
   181→
   182→    echo ""
   183→    log_error "LiteLLM proxy did not become ready"
   184→    log_error "Check if Ollama is running on the host: ollama serve"
   185→    return 1
   186→}
   187→
   188→# Verify workspace is mounted
   189→verify_workspace() {
   190→    if [ ! -d "/home/ralph/workspace" ] || [ -z "$(ls -A /home/ralph/workspace 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
   191→        log_warn "Workspace appears empty"
   192→        log_warn "Mount your project: -v /path/to/project:/home/ralph/workspace"
   193→    fi
   194→}
   195→
   196→# Check if Entire CLI is available and enabled
   197→entire_available() {
   198→    [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ] && command -v entire &>/dev/null
   199→}
   200→
   201→# Fix Entire hooks that reference "go run" (which requires Go to be installed).
   202→# Runs on every command so stale hooks from prior sessions don't cause errors.
   203→fix_entire_hooks() {
   204→    local settings=".claude/settings.json"
   205→    if [ -f "$settings" ] && grep -q 'go run.*entire/main.go' "$settings"; then
   206→        sed -i 's|go run \${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/cmd/entire/main.go|entire|g' "$settings"
   207→        log_info "Fixed Entire hooks to use binary instead of go run"
   208→    fi
   209→}
   210→
   211→# Set up Entire session observability (gracefully degrades if unavailable)
   212→setup_entire() {
   213→    [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" != "true" ] && return 0
   214→    command -v entire &>/dev/null || { log_warn "Entire binary not found"; return 0; }
   215→    git rev-parse --git-dir &>/dev/null || { log_warn "No git repo for Entire"; return 0; }
   216→
   217→    if entire status 2>/dev/null | grep -q "enabled"; then
   218→        fix_entire_hooks
   219→        log_success "Entire already enabled"
   220→        return 0
   221→    fi
   222→
   223→    if entire enable --force 2>&1; then
   224→        fix_entire_hooks
   225→        log_success "Entire enabled"
   226→    else
   227→        log_warn "Entire enable failed, continuing without observability"
   228→    fi
   229→}
   230→
   231→# Display configuration
   232→show_config() {
   233→    local base_url="${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}"
   234→    local backend="Claude API (cloud)"
   235→
   236→    if [[ "$base_url" == *"litellm"* ]] || [[ "$base_url" == *":4000"* ]]; then
   237→        backend="LiteLLM -> Ollama (local)"
   238→    fi
   239→
   240→    echo ""
   241→    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
   242→    echo "  Ralph Loop - Containerized"
   243→    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
   244→    echo "  Mode:       ${RALPH_MODE:-build}"
   245→    echo "  Model:      ${RALPH_MODEL:-opus}"
   246→    echo "  Format:     ${RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-pretty}"
   247→    echo "  Max Iter:   ${RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS:-0} (0=unlimited)"
   248→    echo "  Push:       ${RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT:-true}"
   249→    echo "  Backend:    $backend"
   250→    if [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ]; then
   251→        local entire_status="enabled (${RALPH_ENTIRE_STRATEGY:-manual-commit})"
   252→        command -v entire &>/dev/null || entire_status="enabled (binary missing)"
   253→        echo "  Entire:     $entire_status"
   254→    else
   255→        echo "  Entire:     disabled"
   256→    fi
   257→    echo "  Notify:     ${SMTP_USER:-disabled}"
   258→    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
   259→    echo ""
   260→}
   261→
   262→# Main command routing
   263→main() {
   264→    local cmd="${1:-loop}"
   265→    shift || true
   266→
   267→    # Fix stale Entire hooks from prior sessions before any command runs
   268→    fix_entire_hooks
   269→
   270→    case "$cmd" in
   271→        loop)
   272→            validate_environment || exit 1
   273→            detect_auth || exit 1
   274→            wait_for_litellm || exit 1
   275→            verify_workspace
   276→            setup_entire
   277→            show_config
   278→            exec /home/ralph/scripts/loop.sh "$@"
   279→            ;;
   280→        entire-status)
   281→            entire_available && entire status || log_warn "Entire not available"
   282→            ;;
   283→        setup)
   284→            validate_environment || exit 1
   285→            detect_auth || exit 1
   286→            wait_for_litellm || exit 1
   287→            verify_workspace
   288→            log_info "Starting workspace setup..."
   289→            exec /home/ralph/scripts/setup-workspace.sh "$@"
   290→            ;;
   291→        login)
   292→            log_info "Starting interactive Claude login..."
   293→            exec claude auth login
   294→            ;;
   295→        shell)
   296→            log_info "Starting interactive shell..."
   297→            exec /bin/bash
   298→            ;;
   299→        version)
   300→            claude --version
   301→            ;;
   302→        test)
   303→            validate_environment || exit 1
   304→            detect_auth || exit 1
   305→            wait_for_litellm || exit 1
   306→            log_success "All checks passed!"
   307→            claude --version
   308→            ;;
   309→        help|--help|-h)
   310→            cat << 'EOF'
   311→Ralph Docker - Containerized Ralph Loop
   312→
   313→COMMANDS:
   314→  loop            Run the Ralph loop (default)
   315→  setup           Set up a project for Ralph (interactive interview + file generation)
   316→                    --prompt "text"    Provide a detailed project prompt (skips interview, auto-overwrites)
   317→                    --prompt-file path Provide prompt from a file (path relative to your WORKSPACE_PATH)
   318→  login           Authenticate with Claude interactively (credentials persist in ~/.claude volume)
   319→  shell           Start an interactive bash shell
   320→  version         Show Claude CLI version
   321→  test            Run connectivity tests
   322→  entire-status   Show Entire session observability status
   323→  help            Show this help message
   324→
   325→AUTHENTICATION:
   326→  Option 1: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable
   327→  Option 2: docker compose run --rm ralph login (interactive, persists in ~/.claude volume)
   328→
   329→ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES:
   330→  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY       Anthropic API key (simplest auth method)
   331→  RALPH_MODE              build|plan (default: build)
   332→  RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS    Max iterations, 0=unlimited (default: 0)
   333→  RALPH_MODEL             Model name (default: opus, or ollama/model for local)
   334→  RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT     pretty|json (default: pretty)
   335→  RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT Push to git after commits (default: true)
   336→
   337→  RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED        Enable Entire session tracking (default: false)
   338→  RALPH_ENTIRE_STRATEGY       manual-commit|auto-commit (default: manual-commit)
   339→  RALPH_ENTIRE_PUSH_SESSIONS  Push checkpoints on git push (default: true)
   340→  RALPH_ENTIRE_LOG_LEVEL      Entire log verbosity (default: warn)
   341→
   342→  SMTP_HOST / SMTP_PORT       SMTP server for post-session email notifications
   343→  SMTP_USER / SMTP_PASS       SMTP credentials — notifications sent to SMTP_USER
   344→
   345→VOLUMES:
   346→  /home/ralph/workspace   Your project directory
   347→  /home/ralph/.claude     Claude credentials and config
   348→
   349→EXAMPLES:
   350→  # API key mode
   351→  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-... docker compose run --rm ralph
   352→
   353→  # Set up a new project (interactive interview, generates all files)
   354→  WORKSPACE_PATH=/path/to/project docker compose run --rm ralph setup
   355→
   356→  # Set up with a detailed prompt (replaces existing files)
   357→  WORKSPACE_PATH=/path/to/project docker compose run --rm ralph setup --prompt "Problem: ..."
   358→
   359→  # Set up from a prompt file (path is relative to WORKSPACE_PATH)
   360→  WORKSPACE_PATH=/path/to/project docker compose run --rm ralph setup --prompt-file specs/prompt.md
   361→
   362→  # Interactive login (one-time, credentials persist in ~/.claude volume)
   363→  docker compose run --rm ralph login
   364→
   365→  # After login, just run
   366→  docker compose up ralph
   367→
   368→  # Ollama mode (local models via LiteLLM proxy)
   369→  docker compose --profile ollama up ralph-ollama
   370→
   371→  # Plan mode with 5 iterations
   372→  RALPH_MODE=plan RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS=5 docker compose up ralph
   373→
   374→  # Interactive shell for debugging
   375→  docker compose run --rm ralph shell
   376→EOF
   377→            ;;
   378→        *)
   379→            log_error "Unknown command: $cmd"
   380→            log_info "Run 'help' for usage information"
   381→            exit 1
   382→            ;;
   383→    esac
   384→}
   385→
   386→main "$@"
   387→

#!/bin/bash
# Ralph Docker Entrypoint
# Handles auth detection, command routing, and environment setup

set -euo pipefail

# Colors for output
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

log_info() {
    echo -e "${CYAN}[ralph]${NC} $1"
}

log_warn() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[ralph]${NC} $1"
}

log_error() {
    echo -e "${RED}[ralph]${NC} $1"
}

log_success() {
    echo -e "${GREEN}[ralph]${NC} $1"
}

# Environment variable validation functions
validate_ralph_mode() {
    local mode="${RALPH_MODE:-}"
    if [ -n "$mode" ] && [ "$mode" != "build" ] && [ "$mode" != "plan" ]; then
        log_error "Invalid RALPH_MODE: '$mode'"
        log_error "Valid values: build, plan"
        log_error "Leave unset to use default: build"
        return 1
    fi
}

validate_ralph_output_format() {
    local format="${RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-}"
    if [ -n "$format" ] && [ "$format" != "pretty" ] && [ "$format" != "json" ]; then
        log_error "Invalid RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT: '$format'"
        log_error "Valid values: pretty, json"
        log_error "Leave unset to use default: pretty"
        return 1
    fi
}

validate_ralph_max_iterations() {
    local max_iter="${RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS:-}"
    if [ -n "$max_iter" ]; then
        # Check if it's a valid non-negative integer
        if ! [[ "$max_iter" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            log_error "Invalid RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS: '$max_iter'"
            log_error "Must be a non-negative integer (0 for unlimited)"
            log_error "Leave unset to use default: 0"
            return 1
        fi
    fi
}

validate_ralph_push_after_commit() {
    local push="${RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT:-}"
    if [ -n "$push" ] && [ "$push" != "true" ] && [ "$push" != "false" ]; then
        log_error "Invalid RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT: '$push'"
        log_error "Valid values: true, false"
        log_error "Leave unset to use default: true"
        return 1
    fi
}

validate_ralph_model() {
    local model="${RALPH_MODEL:-}"
    if [ -n "$model" ]; then
        # Allow common Claude model names or ollama/* pattern
        case "$model" in
            opus|sonnet|haiku|claude-*|ollama/*)
                # Valid model names
                ;;
            *)
                log_error "Invalid RALPH_MODEL: '$model'"
                log_error "Valid values: opus, sonnet, haiku, claude-*, ollama/*"
                log_error "Examples: opus, sonnet, claude-3-sonnet, ollama/llama2"
                log_error "Leave unset to use default: opus"
                return 1
                ;;
        esac
    fi
}

# Validate all environment variables
validate_environment() {
    local validation_failed=false

    if ! validate_ralph_mode; then
        validation_failed=true
    fi

    if ! validate_ralph_output_format; then
        validation_failed=true
    fi

    if ! validate_ralph_max_iterations; then
        validation_failed=true
    fi

    if ! validate_ralph_push_after_commit; then
        validation_failed=true
    fi

    if ! validate_ralph_model; then
        validation_failed=true
    fi

    if [ "$validation_failed" = true ]; then
        log_error "Environment variable validation failed"
        log_error "Fix the above errors and try again"
        return 1
    fi
}

# Detect authentication mode
detect_auth() {
    local base_url="${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}"
    local api_key="${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:-}"

    # Check if using LiteLLM proxy (Ollama mode) - check both URL patterns and API key
    if [[ "$base_url" == *"litellm"* ]] || [[ "$base_url" == *":4000"* ]]; then
        log_info "Auth mode: LiteLLM proxy -> Ollama (local)"
        return 0
    elif [ -n "$api_key" ] && [ -n "$base_url" ]; then
        log_info "Auth mode: API Key with custom base URL"
        return 0
    elif [ -n "$api_key" ]; then
        log_info "Auth mode: API Key"
        return 0
    elif [ -f "$HOME/.claude/.credentials.json" ]; then
        log_info "Auth mode: OAuth credentials file"
        return 0
    elif [ -f "$HOME/.claude/credentials.json" ]; then
        log_info "Auth mode: OAuth credentials"
        return 0
    else
        log_error "No authentication found!"
        log_error "Option 1: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable"
        log_error "Option 2: Run 'docker compose run --rm ralph login' to authenticate interactively"
        log_error "For Ollama: Use --profile ollama with docker compose"
        return 1
    fi
}

# Wait for LiteLLM proxy to be ready
wait_for_litellm() {
    local base_url="${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}"
    local api_key="${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:-}"

    # Only wait if using LiteLLM
    if [[ "$base_url" != *"litellm"* ]] && [[ "$base_url" != *":4000"* ]]; then
        return 0
    fi

    log_info "Waiting for LiteLLM proxy..."

    local max_attempts=30
    local attempt=1

    while [ $attempt -le $max_attempts ]; do
        # Try health endpoint with API key
        if curl -sf -H "Authorization: Bearer ${api_key}" "${base_url}/health" &> /dev/null; then
            echo ""
            log_success "LiteLLM proxy is ready"
            return 0
        fi

        echo -ne "\r${CYAN}[ralph]${NC} Waiting for LiteLLM... attempt $attempt/$max_attempts"
        sleep 2
        attempt=$((attempt + 1))
    done

    echo ""
    log_error "LiteLLM proxy did not become ready"
    log_error "Check if Ollama is running on the host: ollama serve"
    return 1
}

# Verify workspace is mounted
verify_workspace() {
    if [ ! -d "/home/ralph/workspace" ] || [ -z "$(ls -A /home/ralph/workspace 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
        log_warn "Workspace appears empty"
        log_warn "Mount your project: -v /path/to/project:/home/ralph/workspace"
    fi
}

# Check if Entire CLI is available and enabled
entire_available() {
    [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ] && command -v entire &>/dev/null
}

# Fix Entire hooks that reference "go run" (which requires Go to be installed).
# Runs on every command so stale hooks from prior sessions don't cause errors.
fix_entire_hooks() {
    local settings=".claude/settings.json"
    if [ -f "$settings" ] && grep -q 'go run.*entire/main.go' "$settings"; then
        sed -i 's|go run \${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/cmd/entire/main.go|entire|g' "$settings"
        log_info "Fixed Entire hooks to use binary instead of go run"
    fi
}

# Set up Entire session observability (gracefully degrades if unavailable)
setup_entire() {
    [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" != "true" ] && return 0
    command -v entire &>/dev/null || { log_warn "Entire binary not found"; return 0; }
    git rev-parse --git-dir &>/dev/null || { log_warn "No git repo for Entire"; return 0; }

    if entire status 2>/dev/null | grep -q "enabled"; then
        fix_entire_hooks
        log_success "Entire already enabled"
        return 0
    fi

    if entire enable --force 2>&1; then
        fix_entire_hooks
        log_success "Entire enabled"
    else
        log_warn "Entire enable failed, continuing without observability"
    fi
}

# Display configuration
show_config() {
    local base_url="${ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL:-}"
    local backend="Claude API (cloud)"

    if [[ "$base_url" == *"litellm"* ]] || [[ "$base_url" == *":4000"* ]]; then
        backend="LiteLLM -> Ollama (local)"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    echo "  Ralph Loop - Containerized"
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    echo "  Mode:       ${RALPH_MODE:-build}"
    echo "  Model:      ${RALPH_MODEL:-opus}"
    echo "  Format:     ${RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT:-pretty}"
    echo "  Max Iter:   ${RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS:-0} (0=unlimited)"
    echo "  Push:       ${RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT:-true}"
    echo "  Backend:    $backend"
    if [ "${RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED:-false}" = "true" ]; then
        local entire_status="enabled (${RALPH_ENTIRE_STRATEGY:-manual-commit})"
        command -v entire &>/dev/null || entire_status="enabled (binary missing)"
        echo "  Entire:     $entire_status"
    else
        echo "  Entire:     disabled"
    fi
    echo "  Notify:     ${SMTP_USER:-disabled}"
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    echo ""
}

# Main command routing
main() {
    local cmd="${1:-loop}"
    shift || true

    # Fix stale Entire hooks from prior sessions before any command runs
    fix_entire_hooks

    case "$cmd" in
        loop)
            validate_environment || exit 1
            detect_auth || exit 1
            wait_for_litellm || exit 1
            verify_workspace
            setup_entire
            show_config
            exec /home/ralph/scripts/loop.sh "$@"
            ;;
        entire-status)
            entire_available && entire status || log_warn "Entire not available"
            ;;
        setup)
            validate_environment || exit 1
            detect_auth || exit 1
            wait_for_litellm || exit 1
            verify_workspace
            log_info "Starting workspace setup..."
            exec /home/ralph/scripts/setup-workspace.sh "$@"
            ;;
        login)
            log_info "Starting interactive Claude login..."
            exec claude auth login
            ;;
        shell)
            log_info "Starting interactive shell..."
            exec /bin/bash
            ;;
        version)
            claude --version
            ;;
        test)
            validate_environment || exit 1
            detect_auth || exit 1
            wait_for_litellm || exit 1
            log_success "All checks passed!"
            claude --version
            ;;
        help|--help|-h)
            cat << 'EOF'
Ralph Docker - Containerized Ralph Loop

COMMANDS:
  loop            Run the Ralph loop (default)
  setup           Set up a project for Ralph (interactive interview + file generation)
                    --prompt "text"    Provide a detailed project prompt (skips interview, auto-overwrites)
                    --prompt-file path Provide prompt from a file (path relative to your WORKSPACE_PATH)
  login           Authenticate with Claude interactively (credentials persist in ~/.claude volume)
  shell           Start an interactive bash shell
  version         Show Claude CLI version
  test            Run connectivity tests
  entire-status   Show Entire session observability status
  help            Show this help message

AUTHENTICATION:
  Option 1: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable
  Option 2: docker compose run --rm ralph login (interactive, persists in ~/.claude volume)

ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES:
  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY       Anthropic API key (simplest auth method)
  RALPH_MODE              build|plan (default: build)
  RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS    Max iterations, 0=unlimited (default: 0)
  RALPH_MODEL             Model name (default: opus, or ollama/model for local)
  RALPH_OUTPUT_FORMAT     pretty|json (default: pretty)
  RALPH_PUSH_AFTER_COMMIT Push to git after commits (default: true)

  RALPH_ENTIRE_ENABLED        Enable Entire session tracking (default: false)
  RALPH_ENTIRE_STRATEGY       manual-commit|auto-commit (default: manual-commit)
  RALPH_ENTIRE_PUSH_SESSIONS  Push checkpoints on git push (default: true)
  RALPH_ENTIRE_LOG_LEVEL      Entire log verbosity (default: warn)

  SMTP_HOST / SMTP_PORT       SMTP server for post-session email notifications
  SMTP_USER / SMTP_PASS       SMTP credentials — notifications sent to SMTP_USER

VOLUMES:
  /home/ralph/workspace   Your project directory
  /home/ralph/.claude     Claude credentials and config

EXAMPLES:
  # API key mode
  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-... docker compose run --rm ralph

  # Set up a new project (interactive interview, generates all files)
  WORKSPACE_PATH=/path/to/project docker compose run --rm ralph setup

  # Set up with a detailed prompt (replaces existing files)
  WORKSPACE_PATH=/path/to/project docker compose run --rm ralph setup --prompt "Problem: ..."

  # Set up from a prompt file (path is relative to WORKSPACE_PATH)
  WORKSPACE_PATH=/path/to/project docker compose run --rm ralph setup --prompt-file specs/prompt.md

  # Interactive login (one-time, credentials persist in ~/.claude volume)
  docker compose run --rm ralph login

  # After login, just run
  docker compose up ralph

  # Ollama mode (local models via LiteLLM proxy)
  docker compose --profile ollama up ralph-ollama

  # Plan mode with 5 iterations
  RALPH_MODE=plan RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS=5 docker compose up ralph

  # Interactive shell for debugging
  docker compose run --rm ralph shell
EOF
            ;;
        *)
            log_error "Unknown command: $cmd"
            log_info "Run 'help' for usage information"
            exit 1
            ;;
    esac
}

main "$@"

#!/bin/bash
# Ralph - Autonomous development loop via Docker
# Usage: ./ralph.sh [plan] [max_iterations]
# Auth:  Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, or run: docker compose -f "$RALPH_DOCKER/docker-compose.yml" run --rm ralph login

RALPH_DOCKER="${RALPH_DOCKER:-$HOME/repos/claude/claudecode/ralph-docker}"

if [ ! -d "$RALPH_DOCKER" ]; then
    echo "Error: ralph-docker not found at $RALPH_DOCKER"
    echo "Clone it: git clone <repo-url> $RALPH_DOCKER"
    echo "Or set RALPH_DOCKER=/path/to/ralph-docker"
    exit 1
fi

export WORKSPACE_PATH="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"

if [ "$1" = "plan" ]; then
    export RALPH_MODE=plan
    [ -n "$2" ] && export RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS="$2"
elif [[ "$1" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
    export RALPH_MODE=build
    export RALPH_MAX_ITERATIONS="$1"
else
    export RALPH_MODE=build
fi

cd "$RALPH_DOCKER" && exec docker compose up ralph
